resources.string: This is the beginning of the #%1$s channel.
Microphone permission required to send voice notes.
No app found to open this file.
Referenced message is not loaded yet
Are you sure you want to delete this file?
Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action is irreversible.
Sharkord hit an unexpected error. Reload the app. If this keeps happening, please open an issue with the error details in github.
Sorry, Sharkord crashed and couldn\'t recover.
If this error persists, please create an issue on GitHub.
Sharkord is not optimized for mobile devices yet. The experience will not be ideal.
An error occurred in plugin %1$s at slot %2$s.
An error occurred. Click to copy details.
Press Enter to save, Esc to cancel
Please report this to the plugin developer.
Select a direct message or start a new one.
Server admins can upload custom emojis in server settings
Swipe left to open the user list
Swipe right to open the channel list
A unique identifier for your account on this server. You can use whatever you like, such as an email address or a username. This won\'t be shared publicly.

You are accessing the server over an insecure connection (HTTP). By default, browsers block access to media devices such as your camera and microphone on insecure origins. This means that you won\'t be able to use video or voice chat features while connected to the server over HTTP. If you are the server administrator, you can set up HTTPS by following the instructions in the documentation.
You were invited to join this server
New user registrations are currently disabled. If you do not have an account yet, you need to be invited by an existing user to join this server.
The connection could not be established securely (HTTPS). Do you want to connect using an unencrypted connection (HTTP)?
Users joining with this invite will be assigned this role.
Are you sure you want to perform this action?
Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this user and all associated data? This action cannot be undone.
Create a new invitation link for users to join the server.
Logs will appear here when the plugin generates them
This command does not require any arguments.
No commands available for this plugin
No settings available for this plugin
Plugins are a very powerful way to extend Sharkord\'s functionality, but they also come with significant security risks.
For more details, read the docs at:
We strongly recommend running Sharkord in a Docker container for isolation and reduced risk.
user accounts, steal data, or damage your server
Plugins can read, modify, or delete
Find content in this server. Both messages and files are searchable.
Start typing to search messages and files. Type at least 2 characters.
You are assigning a role to yourself.
This server is password protected. Please enter the password to join.
Share text, images, files and more
This user already has all available roles.
Hangout with voice, video and screen sharing
Let\'s set up your profile to get started.
Could not upload file. Please try again.
This will permanently delete the user and all associated data, including messages, emojis, reactions, and files. This completely wipes the user from the server.
This will delete the user but keep their messages and data intact. The user will be removed from the server, but their messages, emojis, reactions, and files will remain as \"Deleted User\".
Lost connection to the server unexpectedly.
Use your fingerprint to log into Sharkord
Confirm your identity to open Sharkord
Allows the user to join the channel.
Allows the user to send messages.
Allows the user to share their screen.
Allows the user to speak in voice channels.
Allows the user to view the channel.
Allows the user to enable their webcam.
Grants the ability to enable the webcam.
Grants the ability to join voice channels.
Grants the ability to create, update, and delete categories.
Grants the ability to create, update, and delete channels.
Grants the ability to manage channel-specific permissions for roles and users.
Grants the ability to create, update, and delete emojis.
Grants the ability to create, edit, and delete server invites.
Grants the ability to manage messages from all users by editing or deleting them.
Grants the ability to manage plugins.
Grants the ability to create, update, and delete roles.
Grants the ability to manage server settings.
Grants the ability to manage storage, such as enabling or disabling uploads.
Grants the ability to perform updates.
Grants the ability to manage users.
Grants the ability to pin messages.
Grants the ability to react to messages.
Grants the ability to send messages in channels.
Grants the ability to share the screen.
Grants the ability to upload files in channels.
Grants the ability to use plugins, such as executing plugin commands or seeing UI elements added by plugins.
Grants the ability to view user sensitive data like identity, IP address, and location.
Send a notification for every new message.
Allows users to share files in direct messages. This setting only applies if uploads are enabled, and it does not affect existing files in direct messages.
Allow file sharing in direct messages
Allow anyone to register and join the server. If disabled, only invited users can join.
Allows users to upload files to the server. Existing files won\'t be affected.
If enabled, users only need to enter the server password the first time they join.
Ask for password only on first join
Automatically rejoin the last text channel on connect.
Please provide a reason for banning this user (optional).
Cannot ban or unban the deleted user placeholder
Compress camera photos and videos before uploading them to save data and time.
This is the default role. New members will be assigned this role upon joining.
Are you sure you want to delete this channel?
Are you sure you want to delete this emoji? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this file?
Are you sure you want to delete this invite? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this role? If there are members with this role, they will be moved to the default role. This action cannot be undone.
Manage your call and media settings.
Allow users to send direct messages to each other. If disabled, they can only communicate in channels.
Allow users to send direct messages to each other. If disabled, users can only communicate in channels.
Send a notification for every new direct message.
This will be used as :%1$s: in messages
Enter emoji name (no spaces or special characters)
Converts supported image uploads to optimized WebP files.
Controls the WebP quality used for optimized images. Higher values preserve detail but use more storage.
Manage invitation links for users to join the server
Please provide a reason for kicking this user (optional).
Set the display language for the interface.
Browse and discover plugins from the community to extend your server.
Failed to load the plugin marketplace
\"%1$s\" was installed successfully. You need to enable it manually to start using it.
Search plugins by name, author, or tag...
This plugin was verified by Sharkord.
The maximum avatar file size users are allowed to set on their profile.
The maximum profile banner file size users are allowed to set.
Limit how much local storage is used for images.
The maximum size of a single file that can be uploaded to the server.
Maximum number of attachments allowed on a single message. Extra files are ignored.
Send a notification only when mentioned. Ignored if \'All Messages\' is enabled.
You are temporarily muted and deafened while the test is running.
Install plugins to add new features and extend the functionality of your Sharkord server.
No more roles available to assign.
Noise gate is unavailable. Microphone audio will be sent without gating.
Experimental and the heaviest option. Best suited for testing on faster hardware.
Strong suppression, but more likely to affect tone or add artifacts
RNNoise and DTLN are experimental and might not fully work on every browser, device, or microphone setup.
Approximate trade-offs for each mode. Actual CPU, memory use and voice quality depend on your browser, device and microphone.
Experimental. Useful when Standard does not remove enough background noise.
Cleaner in noisy rooms, but can sound more processed
Most compatible option and the safest default.
Good, usually the most natural sounding
Notifications permission has not been granted yet.
Notifications are blocked. Please allow them in your browser settings.
Control when browser notifications are sent.
When enabled, users only need to enter the server password the first time they join.
Only Ask For Password On First Join
General settings related to Sharkord\'s behavior.
Action to take when the global storage quota is exceeded.
This is the owner role. This role has all permissions and cannot be deleted or have its permissions changed.
In this section, you can update your password.
Manage channel-specific permissions for roles and users. These permissions are not inherited from server-level permissions. User permissions take precedence over role permissions.
Plugins have been disabled for this server. Enable plugins in the server settings to manage and use plugins.
Only selected members and roles will be able to view this channel.
Restricts access to this channel to specific roles and members.
Update your personal information and settings here.
This is a public channel; everyone has access by default. These permissions will not be applied unless the channel is set to private. You can do this in the General Settings tab.
This channel is public. Make it private in the General tab to manage specific permissions.
The total amount of storage space allocated to the server.

This is not a hard limit, meaning that files will still be written to disk temporarily even if the quota is exceeded. The overflow action will be applied after the upload is complete. Make sure you have more disk space available than the quota you set here.

The maximum amount of storage space each user can use on the server. You can also configure quotas on a per-role basis in the Roles settings, which will override this global setting for users with that specific role. Use 0 for unlimited
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s?
Are you sure you want to remove the role \"%1$s\" from this user?
Send a notification when someone replies to your message. Ignored if \'All Messages\' is enabled.
Ask for fingerprint/face on every launch if auto-login is active.
Exclude Sharkord audio from the audio captured during screen sharing.
Your browser does not support restricting your own audio during screen sharing. Sharkord audio may be captured in the shared stream, which can cause echo or feedback.
Use this role\'s quota instead of the global quota per user. Users with multiple override roles get the highest quota.

These screen sharing settings are best effort and may not be supported on all platforms or browsers, which means that in some cases the actual resolution, framerate or codec used may differ from the selected ones. In the end, is up to the browser to handle the screen sharing stream in the best way possible, based on the current system performance and network conditions.
Allow users to search messages and files across the server.
Allow users to search for messages and files across the server.
Search invites by code or creator...
Search users by name or identity...
Select a role or user to edit permissions, or add a new override
Select a role to edit or create a new one
Are you sure you want to set this role as the default role? New members will be assigned this role upon joining.
Show users a profile setup dialog the first time they join the server.

When enabled, all file URLs require a signed token with an expiration time. This prevents unauthorized access to files by URL guessing. When disabled, files in public channels are accessible by anyone with the URL.
How long a signed URL remains valid before it expires. Shorter durations enhance security but may cause inconvenience for users accessing files.

Allow users to send multiple video quality layers so receivers can adapt to weaker connections. This will increase bandwidth and CPU usage in the server, but can improve the experience for users on slower connections.
Simulcast is disabled on this server.

Send separate low, medium, and high-quality layers for your webcam and screen share. This uses more bandwidth and CPU, but helps viewers on slower connections receive a smoother stream. Forces the use of VP8 when enabled.

Manage your server\'s storage settings. Control how data is stored, accessed, and managed. Here you can configure storage limits, backup options, and data retention policies to ensure optimal performance and reliability.
When sharing audio from a tab or application, prevent it from also playing through your own playback device.
Your browser does not support suppressing local audio playback during screen sharing. The shared audio will continue to play through your speakers as well as through the voice channel.
Are you sure you want to unban this user?
Your server is running the latest version of Sharkord.
A new version (%1$s) is available for download. Updating will restart the server and may cause temporary downtime.
Update your server\'s logo to make it recognizable.
Check for and install updates to keep your Sharkord server running with the latest features and security improvements.
Automatic updates are not supported in this environment. Please refer to the documentation for manual update instructions.
Select an emoji to edit or upload new ones to customize your server
Manage server users and their permissions
You are in a voice channel, changes will only take effect after you leave and rejoin the channel.
Voice controls are unavailable right now.
This will permanently delete all messages and files from this user.
The user will be deleted, but messages will remain as __delete_user_.
Are you sure you want to delete this category? This WILL delete all the channels within this category. This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this channel? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to disconnect?
